title: Go 1.26 and amqp091-go 1.12 Client Contract · Spiral Systems Review
summary: A delayed handoff reconstructs go 1.26 and amqp091-go 1.12 client contract from producer, broker, queue, delivery, Go runtime, and stakeholder evidence, then challenges one protocol or concurrency misconception. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a reviewed Go client API and lifecycle contract after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Pin Go 1.26.5, amqp091-go 1.12.0, AMQP 0-9-1, RabbitMQ 4.3.2, and the tested operating targets as one reviewed compatibility contract.
Classify amqp091-go methods, synchronous errors, notification channels, delivery channels, contexts, and confirmation streams by ownership and completion meaning.
Treat Delivery fields, properties, headers, and body bytes as untrusted data and validate decoded Go values before domain use.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Separate evidence from confidence · Review Clean Client Build
steps.instruction:
review case — A review Go messaging team handles case 1345 during canary Go consumer decoding old and new envelopes. Build deterministic Go evidence to gate delivered bytes and amqp091 notification ownership without mistaking Go types for validation; keep message identity out of metric labels while preserving causal traces; then fail the canary and prove older Go consumers remain compatible. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Prove a clean Go module download, formatting, vet, tests, race checks, compiled artifact, configuration validation, and graceful teardown under changed inputs.

Inspect the Clean Client Build trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Prove a clean Go module download, formatting, vet, tests, race checks, compiled artifact, configuration validation, and graceful teardown under changed inputs.

hints: For RabbitMQ and Go Record what required effort · Review Clean Client Build, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Clean Client Build precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At RabbitMQ and Go Record what required effort · Review Clean Client Build, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A review Go messaging team handles case 9440 during Go publisher supervisor losing one state notification. Build deterministic Go evidence to gate delivered bytes and amqp091 notification ownership without mistaking Go types for validation; retain screen-reader-readable topology and delivery evidence; then remove the parking binding and expose the remediation gap. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Prove a clean Go module download, formatting, vet, tests, race checks, compiled artifact, configuration validation, and graceful teardown under changed inputs.

For RabbitMQ and Go Record what required effort · Review Clean Client Build, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: A successful go run against one local broker proves a reproducible release artifact and production contract.

checks.description: The evidence cycle runs from problem framing through changed-case validation.
checks.failureMessage: Frame the decision before modeling, and validate after obtaining a result.

checks.description: The evidence note explains the model, failure risk, and verification in the learner’s own words.
checks.failureMessage: Add a causal explanation using prove and clean plus specific case evidence.
